roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Issued
DEFT BAIL HRG & ORDER RELEASING DEF ON OR OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED

/CAL:DEFT MOT RELEASE OR BAIL REDUCTION/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE FOLLOWING OUT OF CUSTODY RELEASE:/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PHC ON DA MTR ON  11-20-19 AND 11-26-19 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET/X:DEFENDANT IS 4011,5 TODAY/X:THE PEOPLE FILE A NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/WIAMTR/S17/TBH:19017307/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:3000/CONTD:TS DA MTR AND TRAILING TRIAL IN CASE # 19017307/DOPC/

/CAL:PHC ON DA MTR/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO70 OAK GROVE BY 4:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PROOF OF EM/DOP/CONTD:POSSIBLY REINSTATE PROBATION AND REMOVE EM/DOP/

/CAL: DA 1203,2 PC MOTION/09    DTS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S17/CTORD: PROBATION REMAINS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED/X: BAIL REMAINS SET AT $10,000/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE ON DA MTR/DOP/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ 40D/CTS:13/VF2:150/X:HARVEY WAIVER ENTERED//SA4:HOLLISTER AT 865 MARKET, SAKS 5TH AVE AT 384 POST ST, OFF 5TH AT 901 MARKET, AND MACYS AT 170 OFARRELL ST/SAORD/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT IS INDIGENT/CTORD:COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES ARE SUSPENDED PURSUANT TO DUENAS/
